articles.title: Bank stocks’ $95 billion rout may deepen on macro risks

Tightening financial conditions and potential derailing of credit recovery threaten loan growth, leading to significant investor withdrawals and market value losses for the Nifty Bank Index.

articles.title: US-Iran war LIVE: Trump issues expletive-laden Hormuz deadline to Tehran; Netanyahu celebrates rescue of American pilot
articles.description: US-Iran war LIVE: President Trump on Sunday issued an expletive-laden threat to Iran, announcing what appeared to be a new and final deadline for Tehran to reopen the crucial Strait of Hormuz, whose closure has upended global energy markets. Follow this space for latest news from the Middle East.

articles.title: War jitters? Trump says US feared Iran ‘trap’ during F-15 crew rescue mission

articles.title: RBI may keep rates unchanged, focus on rupee stability and bond yields
articles.description: The Reserve Bank of India is widely expected to maintain interest rates and its policy stance unchanged due to global economic uncertainties, including the US-Israel conflict impacting energy prices and fiscal deficit concerns. Policymakers will closely monitor the rupee's performance and potential capital outflows, with the RBI possibly considering measures to support the currency without an aggressive immediate response.

articles.title: D-St eyes ‘Sell on Rise’ strategy amid West Asia tensions

Despite oversold conditions, a bearish undertone persists, with Nifty and Sensex facing their sixth consecutive weekly decline. The RBI's upcoming monetary policy review will be closely watched for sentiment cues. Analysts suggest cautious trading with specific strategies for Nifty and recommend select stocks for potential gains.

articles.title: FY26 IPO performance: Only 1 in 3 delivered returns amid market volatility
articles.description: The primary equity market in FY26 presented a challenging landscape, with most IPOs failing to deliver returns post-listing due to heightened volatility and foreign investor exodus. While only a third of the 109 mainboard IPOs posted positive returns, select companies like Ather Energy and Belrise Industries achieved significant gains.

articles.title: Kerala woman missing in Kodagu trek for four days rescued
articles.description: A 36-year-old woman from Kerala, G S Sharanya, was rescued after going missing during a trek in Kodagu, concluding a multi-agency search operation.

articles.title: Wasn’t scared, says Kerala woman rescued 3 days after going missing in Kodagu
articles.description: The trekker, a techie from Kerala, was found deep inside the forest near Tadiyandamol, the highest peak in Kodagu district, at about 5pm on Sunday

articles.title: RBI may keep rates unchanged, focus on rupee stability and bond yields
articles.description: The Reserve Bank of India is widely expected to maintain interest rates and its policy stance unchanged due to global economic uncertainties, including the US-Israel conflict impacting energy prices and fiscal deficit concerns. Policymakers will closely monitor the rupee's performance and potential capital outflows, with the RBI possibly considering measures to support the currency without an aggressive immediate response.

articles.title: Snowfall in higher reaches of Himachal, IMD issues orange warning for hailstorms
articles.description: Rain followed by a heavy hailstorm lashed Shimla on Saturday night, and the city was covered under a thin layer of sleet within minutes.

articles.title: PM Modi targets TMC over ‘ishtehar’ manifesto, slams Malda mob siege in WB rally
articles.description: Modi slammed Mamata govt over calling its manifesto ‘ishtehar’, alleged it shelters infiltrators, and accused it of appeasement politics

articles.title: Bank stocks’ $95 billion rout may deepen on macro risks
articles.description: Indian bank stocks face further pain as the central bank's currency market actions and rising energy prices dampen profit outlooks. Tightening financial conditions and potential derailing of credit recovery threaten loan growth, leading to significant investor withdrawals and market value losses for the Nifty Bank Index.

articles.title: War jitters? Trump says US feared Iran ‘trap’ during F-15 crew rescue mission
articles.description: Trump says the US feared an Iranian trap during a high-risk F-15 rescue mission, as a stranded crew member survived over 24 hours before special forces extraction.

articles.title: D-St eyes ‘Sell on Rise’ strategy amid West Asia tensions
articles.description: Indian markets brace for volatility as the West Asia conflict fuels investor nervousness. Despite oversold conditions, a bearish undertone persists, with Nifty and Sensex facing their sixth consecutive weekly decline. The RBI's upcoming monetary policy review will be closely watched for sentiment cues. Analysts suggest cautious trading with specific strategies for Nifty and recommend select stocks for potential gains.

topStories.title: US pizza chain Gina Maria’s closes all US outlets after 50 years, files for bankruptcy
topStories.description: Gina Maria's Pizza, a 50-year-old Minnesota chain, has filed for Chapter 7 bankruptcy with $2.9 million in debt. All four Twin Cities locations shut without warning in October 2025, marking the end of a regional institution.

dailyNews.title: Warnock likens pro-Trump Christian leaders to those who used Scripture to defend slavery
dailyNews.description: Sen. Warnock compares Christian leaders backing Trump to those who justified slavery, saying their faith-based support for the president is misguided.

dailyNews.title: White House faith advisor says Americans are leaving organized religion but not losing faith in God
dailyNews.description: Paula White-Cain delivers an Easter message of hope and redemption while pushing back on data showing declining religious affiliation in the U.S.

dailyNews.title: Trump Revels in Threats to Commit War Crimes in Iran
dailyNews.description: The president said he would bomb Iran “back to the Stone Ages.” Until this administration, American leaders had insisted they were trying to follow international law in war.

dailyNews.title: Stephen Miller Is Still Pursuing His Immigration Agenda, but More Quietly
dailyNews.description: The architect of President Trump’s mass deportation campaign wants “a moratorium on immigration from third world countries until we can heal ourselves as a nation.” The chaos in Minneapolis has not pushed him off that course.

dailyNews.title: 4/5: CBS Weekend News
dailyNews.description: Latest details on daring mission to rescue U.S. airman from Iran after fighter jet shot down; Trump sends profanity-laden threat to Iran.

dailyNews.title: Missing U.S. crew member from downed fighter jet rescued in Iran, Trump says
dailyNews.description: A U.S. crew member who went missing when an F-15E fighter jet was shot down over a remote area of Iran has been rescued by U.S. forces.

dailyNews.title: "WE GOT HIM!," Trump declares after U.S. airman rescued deep inside Iran
dailyNews.description: As the Iran war passes the five-week mark, President Trump hailed the rescue of a U.S. airman who was missing for days inside Iran — and threatened to hit power plants if Iran doesn't let the Strait of Hormuz open.

dailyNews.title: Latest on Iran: U.S. airman rescued, Trump makes profanity-laced ultimatum
dailyNews.description: Charlie D'Agata and Taurean Small have the latest news on the Iran war, including details on the rescue of a U.S. airman whose fighter jet was shot down and President Trump's new demand for the Iranians to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens Tuesday strikes on Iran's power plants and bridges in profanity-laden post
dailyNews.description: President Trump threatened to hit Iranian power plants and bridges on Tuesday as he posted another ultimatum on social media Sunday morning. "Open the F*****' Strait, you crazy bastards, or you'll be living in Hell," the president wrote. Taurean Small reports

dailyNews.title: Trump vows Iran will be 'living in Hell' by Tuesday if Strait of Hormuz deadline missed
dailyNews.description: "Tuesday will be Power Plant Day, and Bridge Day, all wrapped up in one, in Iran. There will be nothing like it!!!" Trump said in a Truth Social post.

dailyNews.title: Japan, South Korea stocks open higher as investors assess Trump's Iran war comments, extended deadline
dailyNews.description: In an expletive-filled social media post, Trump also vowed to bring "Hell" to the country after the U.S. forces had rescued an American airman shot down in Iran last week.
